property.description: After joining the Guild, your first perk is following the Guild Master daily to defeat the imprisoned monster. The Forbidden Overlord is extremely powerful — guild members must cooperate. All members who defeat the Forbidden Overlord get rich rewards, even freeloaders. Failed challengers get nothing, however brave.
property.name: Guild Instance

property.description: You can now team up to enter floors 3 and 4 of certain dungeons for higher rewards and stronger bosses
property.name: Team BOSS

property.description: You can now team up to enter floors 3 and 4 of certain dungeons for higher rewards and stronger bosses
property.name: Team BOSS

property.description: You can now team up to enter floors 3 and 4 of certain dungeons for higher rewards and stronger bosses
property.name: Team BOSS

property.description: During the event, all server players get double EXP from monsters, stackable with EXP books — +1x on top of existing rate.
property.name: double EXP

property.description: Defeat Demon Palace BOSS for a chance to drop large quantities of Exchange Vouchers. Collect them and exchange at event NPCs in the 4 corners. Killing players in the event map does not increase PK value.
property.name: Monster Invasion

property.description: Ice Island mining yields rare materials. Ores vary by location — more remote means rarer and higher yield. You can safely collect low-level ores or compete for high-level ores. No death penalty on the island.
property.name: Mining

property.description:
All guild leaders can apply for siege at the 'Royal City Battle Admin' in the Imperial Palace with a 'Zuma Portrait'.
Siege starts at 8:30 PM, once every 3 days.
The winning guild becomes the Royal City Guild.
Royal City Guild members get a special title.
Royal City Guild members can claim the 'Royal City Gift Pack' daily.
property.name: Shabak Siege Battle
